docs: Pause the contract (owner only)
messages.label: pause

docs: Unpause the contract (owner only)
messages.label: unpause

docs: Check if contract is paused
messages.label: is_paused

docs: Admin: Add or update a pool (for demo/testing)
messages.label: set_pool

docs: Set default fee for new pools (owner only).
Fee upper bound is 10% (1000 basis points) to provide flexibility for
specialized pools while preventing unreasonable fees.
messages.label: set_default_fee

docs: Set fee for a specific pool (owner only)
messages.label: set_pool_fee

docs: Propose ownership transfer to a new owner (two-step transfer)
messages.label: propose_ownership_transfer

docs: Accept ownership transfer (must be called by pending owner)
messages.label: accept_ownership

docs: Swap tokens with slippage protection and deadline.
Returns error if output is less than min_amount_out or deadline has passed.
messages.label: swap

docs: Add liquidity to a pool. Returns LP tokens minted.
messages.label: add_liquidity

docs: Remove liquidity from a pool
Returns (amount_a, amount_b) withdrawn
messages.label: remove_liquidity

docs: Get the owner of the contract
messages.label: get_owner

docs: Get token price in terms of quote_token.
Returns price as: how many quote_tokens per 1 token (scaled by 1e9).
Example: If reserve_a=100, reserve_b=200, get_token_price(token_a, token_b) = 2e9
messages.label: get_token_price

docs: Get pool info
messages.label: get_pool

docs: Get pool info (Option variant for backward compatibility)
messages.label: get_pool_optional

docs: Get user's LP position
messages.label: get_lp_position

docs: Get user's LP position (Option variant for backward compatibility)
messages.label: get_lp_position_optional

docs: Get expected output for a swap (with fee)
messages.label: get_swap_quote

docs: Calculate price impact of a trade
messages.label: get_price_impact

docs: Get all pool keys
messages.label: get_all_pools

docs: Get pool count
messages.label: get_pool_count

docs: Paginated pool listing to avoid large responses.
messages.label: get_pools_paginated

docs: Emergency withdrawal of tokens (owner-only, when paused).
Allows the owner to rescue funds in case of emergency situations.
messages.label: emergency_withdraw

docs: Emergency drain of all tokens from a specific pool (owner-only, when paused)
messages.label: emergency_drain_pool
